params.name: Chidori Incense Burner
params.description:
On Dec 27, 1585 AD, Politician Toyotomi purchased the Chidori Incense Burner and hid it deep inside his castle.
The Chidori Incense Burner is a three-legged incense burner of Toyotomi. The bandit Ishikawa Goemon had his eyes on it and wanted to steal it. However, just as he was about to get away with it, the Chidori decoration on the lid made a sound, and he was discovered by the guards and arrested. The thief was eventually sentenced to death by boiling and died on the river bank at the age …
